# Figure 3: Biology of dominant pathways and squared deviation of dominant vs. non-dominant pathways

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GOSemSim)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(rstatix)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
summary_path = "figures/figure2/metadata_annotation/annotation_table.tsv"
summary_df = read_tsv(here(summary_path)) 

# read in upregulated microarray-RNAseq pathway matrix (data for figure 2a)
up_pathway_df = read_tsv(here("figures/figureS4/figureS4a/marray_rnaseq_asinh_up_pathways.tsv"))
pathways = up_pathway_df$Description

# microarray upregulated signatures
microarray_cols <- colnames(up_pathway_df)[colnames(up_pathway_df) %in% summary_df$signature_name[summary_df$technology == "microarray" &                                                                               summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_microarray"]]
# get pathways (row names) that are enriched (cell != 0) in at least 90% of the signatures in the following matrix
up_micro_mat <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, microarray_cols, drop = FALSE])
row.names(up_micro_mat) = pathways
# ensure numeric
storage.mode(up_micro_mat) <- "numeric"
# proportion of non-zero entries per pathway (row)
prop_nonzero <- rowMeans(up_micro_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
# pathways enriched in at least 90% of signatures
up_micro_dominant_pathways <- rownames(up_micro_mat)[prop_nonzero >= 0.9]
          
# microarray upregulated signatures          
rnaseq_cols <- colnames(up_pathway_df)[colnames(up_pathway_df) %in% summary_df$signature_name[summary_df$technology == "RNAseq" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_RNAseq"]]
# get pathways (row names) that are enriched (cell != 0) in at least 90% of the signatures in the following matrix
up_rnaseq_mat <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, rnaseq_cols, drop = FALSE])
row.names(up_rnaseq_mat) = pathways
# ensure numeric
storage.mode(up_rnaseq_mat) <- "numeric"
# proportion of non-zero entries per pathway (row)
prop_nonzero <- rowMeans(up_rnaseq_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
# pathways enriched in at least 90% of signatures
up_rnaseq_dominant_pathways <- rownames(up_rnaseq_mat)[prop_nonzero >= 0.9]

up_dominant_pathways = intersect(up_micro_dominant_pathways, up_rnaseq_dominant_pathways)
```

```{r}
compute_pathway_deviation <- function(mat, agg_col) {

  # r_p^aggr : aggregated pathway ratios
  r_aggr <- mat[, agg_col]

  # r_{p,i} : individual pathway ratios
  indiv_mat <- mat[, setdiff(colnames(mat), agg_col), drop = FALSE]

  # number of individual signatures (n)
  n <- ncol(indiv_mat)

  tibble(
    pathway = rownames(mat),

    # med(r_p) across ALL individual signatures (zeros included)
    median_individual = apply(
      indiv_mat,
      1,
      function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),

    # r_p^aggr
    aggregated = r_aggr,

    # D_p = (1 / n) * (r_p^aggr - med(r_p))^2
    deviation_score = (1 / n) * (r_aggr - median_individual)^2
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Upregulated
# matrix of individual microarray signatures
up_micro_indiv <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, microarray_cols, drop = FALSE])
rownames(up_micro_indiv) <- up_pathway_df$Description
storage.mode(up_micro_indiv) <- "numeric"

# proportion non-zero
micro_prop <- rowMeans(up_micro_indiv != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
micro_ge90 <- names(micro_prop[micro_prop >= 0.9])

# add aggregated column ONLY for sq dev computation
up_micro_mat <- cbind(
  up_micro_indiv,
  aggregated_microarray = up_pathway_df$aggregated_microarray
)

micro_sq_up <- compute_pathway_deviation(
  up_micro_mat,
  agg_col = "aggregated_microarray"
) %>%
  mutate(
    technology = "Microarray",
    enrichment = ifelse(
      pathway %in% micro_ge90,
      "Dominant\nGO:BP terms",
      "Non-dominant\nGO:BP terms"
    ),
    direction = "Upregulated"
  )

# RNAseq
up_rna_indiv <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, rnaseq_cols, drop = FALSE])
rownames(up_rna_indiv) <- up_pathway_df$Description
storage.mode(up_rna_indiv) <- "numeric"

rna_prop <- rowMeans(up_rna_indiv != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
rna_ge90 <- names(rna_prop[rna_prop >= 0.9])

up_rna_mat <- cbind(
  up_rna_indiv,
  aggregated_RNAseq = up_pathway_df$aggregated_RNAseq
)

rna_sq_up <- compute_pathway_deviation(
  up_rna_mat,
  agg_col = "aggregated_RNAseq"
) %>%
  mutate(
    technology = "RNAseq",
    enrichment = ifelse(
      pathway %in% rna_ge90,
      "Dominant\nGO:BP terms",
      "Non-dominant\nGO:BP terms"
    ),
    direction = "Upregulated"
  )

sq_dev_up <- bind_rows(micro_sq_up, rna_sq_up)

```

```{r}
dn_pathway_df <- read_tsv(
  here("figures/figureS4/figureS4b/marray_rnaseq_asinh_dn_pathways.tsv")
)

# Microarray
dn_micro_indiv <- as.matrix(dn_pathway_df[, microarray_cols, drop = FALSE])
rownames(dn_micro_indiv) <- dn_pathway_df$Description
storage.mode(dn_micro_indiv) <- "numeric"

micro_prop_dn <- rowMeans(dn_micro_indiv != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
micro_ge90_dn <- names(micro_prop_dn[micro_prop_dn >= 0.9])

dn_micro_mat <- cbind(
  dn_micro_indiv,
  aggregated_microarray = dn_pathway_df$aggregated_microarray
)

micro_sq_dn <- compute_pathway_deviation(
  dn_micro_mat,
  agg_col = "aggregated_microarray"
) %>%
  mutate(
    technology = "Microarray",
    enrichment = ifelse(
      pathway %in% micro_ge90_dn,
      "Dominant\nGO:BP terms",
      "Non-dominant\nGO:BP terms"
    ),
    direction = "Downregulated"
  )

# RNAseq
dn_rna_indiv <- as.matrix(dn_pathway_df[, rnaseq_cols, drop = FALSE])
rownames(dn_rna_indiv) <- dn_pathway_df$Description
storage.mode(dn_rna_indiv) <- "numeric"

rna_prop_dn <- rowMeans(dn_rna_indiv != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
rna_ge90_dn <- names(rna_prop_dn[rna_prop_dn >= 0.9])

dn_rna_mat <- cbind(
  dn_rna_indiv,
  aggregated_RNAseq = dn_pathway_df$aggregated_RNAseq
)

rna_sq_dn <- compute_pathway_deviation(
  dn_rna_mat,
  agg_col = "aggregated_RNAseq"
) %>%
  mutate(
    technology = "RNAseq",
    enrichment = ifelse(
      pathway %in% rna_ge90_dn,
      "Dominant\nGO:BP terms",
      "Non-dominant\nGO:BP terms"
    ),
    direction = "Downregulated"
  )

sq_dev_dn <- bind_rows(micro_sq_dn, rna_sq_dn)
```

```{r}

sq_dev_df <- bind_rows(
  sq_dev_up,
  sq_dev_dn
)

sq_dev_df <- sq_dev_df %>%
  mutate(
    direction = recode(
      direction,
      "Downregulated" = "Downregulated"
    ),
    direction = factor(
      direction,
      levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated") 
    )
  )

pdf(here("figures/figure3/Figure3_squared_deviation_dominant_pathways.pdf"),
    width = 6, height = 8)

ggplot(
  sq_dev_df,
  aes(x = enrichment, y = deviation_score, fill = enrichment)
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = 10^seq(-10, 0, by = 2),
    labels = seq(-10, 0, by = 2)
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    direction ~ technology,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Enrichment",
    y = "Squared deviation (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = NA)
  )

dev.off()
```
```{r table S5}
mw_table <- sq_dev_df %>%
  group_by(direction, technology) %>%
  wilcox_test(deviation_score ~ enrichment) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%   
  add_significance("p.adj") %>%
  select(direction, technology, 
         group1, group2, 
         n1, n2, 
         statistic, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif)

mw_table
```

```{r}
mw_table$technology <- factor(
  mw_table$technology,
  levels = c("Microarray", "RNAseq")
)


mw_gt_table <- mw_table %>%
  arrange(technology) %>%
  mutate(
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    p = signif(p, 3),
    p.adj = signif(p.adj, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Direction = direction,
    Technology = technology,
    `Dominant pathways (≥90% enriched)` = n1,
    `Non-dominant pathways (<90% enriched)` = n2,
    Statistic = statistic,
    `p-value` = p,
    `Adjusted p-value` = p.adj,
    #Significance = p.adj.signif
  ) %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "Technology") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Dominant pathways exhibit statistically lower deviation across technologies",
    subtitle = "Mann-Whitney tests comparing ≥90% vs. <90% enriched pathways"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    everything()
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(
    columns = c(Statistic,`p-value`, `Adjusted p-value`),
    decimals = 2
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    everything() ~ px(150)
  )
# Save the table as HTML
gtsave(mw_gt_table, here("figures/figure3/tableS5_stats_dominant_pathways.html"))
```
